statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Existing Offline Files policy record
links.summary: The core Offline Files feature policy is already documented separately.

links.title: Current privacy provider service bundle
links.summary: The provider disables the CSC and CscService services for the current sub-tweak.

links.title: Repo privacy docs for Offline Files service hardening
links.summary: The repo docs list the Offline Files registry policy and the service commands Set-Service -Name "CSC" -StartupType Disabled and Set-Service -Name "CscService" -StartupType Disabled.
